zh.lifeSummary: 當Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan於1321年出生在波蘭其隆格奧斯吉沃格福斯吉時，她的父親Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II29歲，母親Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel25歲。她和Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1362年7月15日在波蘭萊瓦福斯吉萊格尼尼次吉享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan于1321年出生在波兰其隆格奧斯吉沃格福斯吉时，她的父亲Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II29岁，母亲Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel25岁。她和Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1362年7月15日在波兰萊瓦福斯吉萊格尼尼次吉享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Zagan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Slovenian or Croatian Darko, Marko.
Slovenian and Croatian (Žagar): occupational name from Slovenian and dialectal Croatian žagar ‘sawyer’. Compare Sagar , Sager , Schager , and Zager .

variants.name: Sagar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Vidya, Ajay, Ashok, Prem, Satya, Sushil, Vinod, Ajit, Alok, Amrit, Anand, Ananda.
Indian (Punjab, Gujarat): from Sanskrit personal name sāgara ‘ocean’.

variants.name: Zager
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhart, Gunther, Heinz, Kurt.
German: habitational name from Zager, a place near Wollin.
Americanized form of Slovenian and Croatian Žagar ‘sawyer’ (see Zagar ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Agnieszka
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: "Agnes"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan was born in 1321, in głogowski, Zielona Góra, Poland, her father, Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II, was 29 and her mother, Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel, was 25. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg. She died on 15 July 1362, in Legnica, Wrocław, Poland, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan est née en 1321, à głogowski, zielonogórskie, Pologne, son père, Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg. Elle est décédée le 15 juillet 1362, à Legnicki, wrocławskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan 1321 in głogowski, zielonogórskie, Polen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II 29 und ihre Mutter Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel 25. Sie hatte mit Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Juli 1362 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan è nata il nel 1321 nel głogowski, zielonogórskie, Polonia, sua padre, Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg. Morì il 15 luglio 1362, nel Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zaganが1321年にポーランドズエロノグoルスキグlオゴウスキで生まれた時，父Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau IIは29歳，母Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedelは25歳であった。彼女はDuke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzegとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1362年7月15日にポーランドウロクlアウスキレグニクイで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan(이)가 1321년 폴란드 지론그o르스키 그l고우스키에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1362년 7월 15일 폴란드 록l아w스키 레그닉키에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan nasceu em 1321, em głogowski, zielonogórskie, Polônia, seu pai, Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg. Ela faleceu em 15 de julho de 1362, em Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polônia, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan родилась в 1321 г. в местности гlогоуски, зиелоногoрски, Польша, её отцу по имени Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg. Она умерла 15 июля 1362 г. в местности легникки, рокlавски, Польша в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duchess of Brzeg Agnieszka "Agnes" of Zagan nació en 1321, en głogowski, zielonogórskie, Polonia, su papá, Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Duke Louis Piast I the Fair  of Brzeg. Murió el 15 de julio de 1362, en Legnicki, wrocławskie, Polonia, a la edad de 41 años.
